series_metadata.series_title: Daily Patrol Telephone & Radio Log and Supplement
series_metadata.series_description: To provide a hard copy and electronic record of daily events and all routine and emergency radio and telephone communications by uniform officers of the division. This record series includes OHP-53 and OH-53B.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all activities are entered into CAD system and ; Electronic: two (2) years, current
